title: THE $1 CODER: This CODER COSTS $1 AND GIVES YOU $50 WORTH USAGE!
summary: Command Code is a coding agent harness optimized for open-source models including DeepSeek, Kimi, GLM, Qwen, and MiniMax. It improves agent performance through routing, caching, context handling, and tool-call repair. The Go plan costs one dollar per month and includes credits for testing open-source models on real coding tasks.
writeup: The video covers Command Code, a coding agent harness built for open-source models including DeepSeek, Qwen, and others. It explains how the harness raises agent performance through routing, caching, context handling, and tool-call repair, and it notes pricing that starts at one dollar per month. The summary cites evaluation claims that DeepSeek V4 Pro outperforms Opus 4.7 on hard, tool-heavy tasks.
